<div id="content"
class="mdx-content @container/columns-container relative mt-8 prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert [contain:inline-size] isolate empty:hidden mb-14"
page-title="Build an MCP App" page-href="/extensions/apps/build">

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build.html#prerequisites"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Prerequisites</span>

<span data-as="p">You’ll need
<a href="https://nodejs.org/en/download" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">Node.js</a> 18 or higher. Familiarity with
<a href="../../specification/latest/server/tools.html" class="link">MCP
tools</a> and <a href="../../specification/latest/server/resources.html"
class="link">resources</a> is recommended since MCP Apps combine both
primitives. Experience with the
<a href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">MCP TypeScript SDK</a>
will help you better understand the server-side patterns.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build.html#getting-started"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Getting started</span>

<span data-as="p">The fastest way to create an MCP App is using an AI
coding agent with the MCP Apps skill. If you prefer to set up a project
manually, skip to
<a href="build.html#manual-setup" class="link">Manual setup</a>.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build.html#using-an-ai-coding-agent"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Using an AI coding agent</span>

<span data-as="p">AI coding agents with Skills support can scaffold a
complete MCP App project for you. Skills are folders of instructions and
resources that your agent loads when relevant. They teach the AI how to
perform specialized tasks like creating MCP Apps.</span>
<span data-as="p">The `create-mcp-app` skill includes architecture
guidance, best practices, and working examples that the agent uses to
generate your project.</span>

<div class="steps ml-3.5 mt-10 mb-6" role="list">

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

1

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="build.html#" class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Install the skill

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">If you are using Claude Code, you can install the
skill directly with:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="3" language="text">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
/plugin marketplace add modelcontextprotocol/ext-apps
/plugin install mcp-apps@modelcontextprotocol-ext-apps
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">You can also use the
<a href="https://skills.sh/" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">Vercel Skills CLI</a> to install skills across
different AI coding agents:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="1" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
npx skills add modelcontextprotocol/ext-apps
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Alternatively, you can install the skill manually by
cloning the ext-apps repository:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="1" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
git clone https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/ext-apps.git
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">And then copying the skill to the appropriate location
for your agent:</span>

<div class="[--page-padding:20px] overflow-x-auto flex w-[calc(100%+(var(--page-padding)*2))] my-[1em] py-[1em] -mx-[var(--page-padding)] max-w-none [contain:inline-size]"
table-wrapper="true">

<div class="px-[var(--page-padding)] grow max-w-none table">

| Agent | Skills directory (macOS/Linux) | Skills directory (Windows) |
|----|----|----|
| <a href="https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code/skills"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">Claude Code</a> | `~/.claude/skills/` | `%USERPROFILE%\.claude\skills\` |
| <a
href="https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/customization/agent-skills"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">VS Code</a> and <a
href="https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/concepts/agents/about-agent-skills"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">GitHub Copilot</a> | `~/.copilot/skills/` | `%USERPROFILE%\.copilot\skills\` |
| <a href="https://geminicli.com/docs/cli/skills/" class="link"
target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">Gemini CLI</a> | `~/.gemini/skills/` | `%USERPROFILE%\.gemini\skills\` |
| <a
href="https://cline.bot/blog/cline-3-48-0-skills-and-websearch-make-cline-smarter"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">Cline</a> | `~/.cline/skills/` | `%USERPROFILE%\.cline\skills\` |
| <a
href="https://block.github.io/goose/docs/guides/context-engineering/using-skills/"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">Goose</a> | `~/.config/goose/skills/` | `%USERPROFILE%\.config\goose\skills\` |
| <a href="https://developers.openai.com/codex/skills/" class="link"
target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">Codex</a> | `~/.codex/skills/` | `%USERPROFILE%\.codex\skills\` |
| <a href="https://cursor.com/docs/context/skills" class="link"
target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">Cursor</a> | `~/.cursor/skills/` | `%USERPROFILE%\.cursor\skills\` |

</div>

</div>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20"
callout-type="note">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">This list is not comprehensive. Other agents may
support skills in different locations; check your agent’s
documentation.</span>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">For example, with Claude Code you can install the
skill globally (available in all projects):</span>

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"
dir="ltr" orientation="horizontal">

component-part="code-group-tab-bar">

role="tablist" aria-orientation="horizontal" tabindex="-1"

macOS/Linux

class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

<div class="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">

<div id="radix-_R_2ti7ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-0"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="active" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_2ti7ldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-0"
tabindex="-1" style="animation-duration:0s">

component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"

component-part="code-group-tab-content">

``` shiki
cp -r ext-apps/plugins/mcp-apps/skills/create-mcp-app ~/.claude/skills/create-mcp-app
```

<span data-as="p">Or install it for a single project only by copying to
`.claude/skills/` in your project directory:</span>

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"
dir="ltr" orientation="horizontal">

<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 relative pr-2.5 *:first:*:ml-2.5"

role="tablist" aria-orientation="horizontal" tabindex="-1"

macOS/Linux

</div>

<div class="absolute -bottom-1.5 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 rounded-full bg-primary dark:bg-primary-light peer-empty/title:hidden">

</div>

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:100%;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

component-part="code-group-tab-content">

``` shiki
mkdir -p .claude/skills && cp -r ext-apps/plugins/mcp-apps/skills/create-mcp-app .claude/skills/create-mcp-app
```

<span data-as="p">To verify the skill is installed, ask your agent “What
skills do you have access to?” — you should see `create-mcp-app` as one
of the available skills.</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

2

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="build.html#" class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Create your app

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">Ask your AI coding agent to build it:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="2" language="text">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
Create an MCP App that displays a color picker
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">The agent will recognize the `create-mcp-app` skill is
relevant, load its instructions, then scaffold a complete project with
server, UI, and configuration files.</span>

<div>

<div class="frame p-2 not-prose relative bg-gray-50/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden dark:bg-gray-800/25 print:print-color-exact"
data-name="frame">

<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-grid-neutral-200/20 [mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,#fff,rgba(255,255,255,0.6))] dark:bg-grid-white/5 dark:[mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.1),rgba(255,255,255,0.5))] print:print-color-exact"
style="background-position:10px 10px">

</div>

<div class="relative rounded-xl overflow-hidden flex justify-center">

<span aria-owns="rmiz-modal-" rmiz=""><span rmiz-content="not-found"
style="visibility:visible"><img
src="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/GU_E-622SLWFdCrP/images/quickstart-apps/create-mcp-app-skill.gif?s=6c3a3b8a7590b5e97b5c3d8480a9ab12"
class="object-contain" style="aspect-ratio:800 / 563"
data-path="images/quickstart-apps/create-mcp-app-skill.gif"
decoding="async" sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px"
data-optimize="true" width="800" height="563"
alt="Creating a new MCP App with Claude Code" /></span></span>

</div>

<div class="relative rounded-2xl text-center mt-3 pt-0 px-8 pb-2 text-sm text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-400 [&_p]:m-0 [&_a]:font-semibold [&_a]:no-underline [&_a]:border-b [&_a]:border-primary [&_a:hover]:border-b-2 dark:[&_a]:text-white dark:[&_a]:border-primary-light"
contenteditable="false" component-part="frame-caption">

<div class="space-y-4 whitespace-normal">

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Manual setup</span>

<span data-as="p">If you’re not using an AI coding agent, or prefer to
understand the setup process, follow these steps.</span>

<div class="steps ml-3.5 mt-10 mb-6" role="list">

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

from the UI code:</span>

aria-hidden="true" component-part="tree-folder-children-line">

role="treeitem" aria-level="3" aria-selected="false" tabindex="-1"
style="--padding-left:50">

src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="shrink-0 select-none size-4" /><span class="truncate text-sm font-medium leading-5 -tracking-[0.1px]"

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">The server registers the tool and serves the UI
resource. The UI resource will eventually be rendered in a secure iframe
with deny-by-default CSP configuration. If your app has CSS and JS
assets, you will need to <a
href="https://apps.extensions.modelcontextprotocol.io/api/documents/Patterns.html#configuring-csp-and-cors"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">configure CSP</a>, or you
can bundle your assets into the HTML with a tool like
`vite-plugin-singlefile`, which is what we will do in this
tutorial.</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

2

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="build.html#" class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Install dependencies

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="2" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
npm install @modelcontextprotocol/ext-apps @modelcontextprotocol/sdk
npm install -D typescript vite vite-plugin-singlefile express cors @types/express @types/cors tsx
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">The `ext-apps` package provides helpers for both the
server side (registering tools and resources) and the client side (the
`App` class for UI-to-host communication). Vite with the
`vite-plugin-singlefile` plugin is used here to bundle your UI and
assets into a single HTML file for convenience, but this is optional —
you can use any bundler or serve unbundled files if you <a
href="https://apps.extensions.modelcontextprotocol.io/api/documents/Patterns.html#configuring-csp-and-cors"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">configure CSP</a>.</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

3

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="build.html#" class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Configure the project

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<div id="package-json" class="tabs tabs tab-container">

- <div id="package-json">

  <div class="flex text-sm items-center gap-1.5 leading-6 font-semibold whitespace-nowrap pt-3 pb-2.5 -mb-px max-w-max border-b text-primary dark:text-primary-light border-current"
  component-part="tab-button" active="true" testid="tab-package.json">

  package.json

  </div>

  </div>

- <div id="tsconfig-json">

  <div class="flex text-sm items-center gap-1.5 leading-6 font-semibold whitespace-nowrap pt-3 pb-2.5 -mb-px max-w-max border-b text-gray-900 border-transparent hover:border-gray-300 dark:text-gray-200 dark:hover:border-gray-700"
  component-part="tab-button" active="false" testid="tab-tsconfig.json">

  tsconfig.json

  </div>

  </div>

- <div id="vite-config-ts">

  <div class="flex text-sm items-center gap-1.5 leading-6 font-semibold whitespace-nowrap pt-3 pb-2.5 -mb-px max-w-max border-b text-gray-900 border-transparent hover:border-gray-300 dark:text-gray-200 dark:hover:border-gray-700"
  component-part="tab-button" active="false"
  testid="tab-vite.config.ts">

  vite.config.ts

  </div>

  </div>

<div>

<div id="panel-package-json-0"
class="prose dark:prose-dark overflow-x-auto [&_[data-table-wrapper]]:![--page-padding:0px] [&_[role="listitem"]]:pl-4 [&>:first-child:not(p)]:mt-0 [&>:first-child:not(p)_img]:mt-0 [&>:first-child[data-table-wrapper]]:!pt-0"
role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="package-json"
component-part="tab-content">

<span data-as="p">The `"type": "module"` setting enables ES module
syntax. The `build` script uses the `INPUT` environment variable to tell
Vite which HTML file to bundle. The `serve` script runs your server
using `tsx` for TypeScript execution.</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="7" language="json">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
{
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "build": "INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build",
    "serve": "npx tsx server.ts"
  }
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div id="panel-tsconfig-json-1"
class="prose dark:prose-dark overflow-x-auto [&_[data-table-wrapper]]:![--page-padding:0px] [&_[role="listitem"]]:pl-4 [&>:first-child:not(p)]:mt-0 [&>:first-child:not(p)_img]:mt-0 [&>:first-child[data-table-wrapper]]:!pt-0 hidden"
role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="tsconfig-json"
component-part="tab-content">

<span data-as="p">The TypeScript configuration targets modern JavaScript
(`ES2022`) and uses ESNext modules with bundler resolution, which works
well with Vite. The `include` array covers both the server code in the
root and UI code in `src/`.</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="12" language="json">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2022",
    "module": "ESNext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "strict": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "outDir": "dist"
  },
  "include": ["*.ts", "src/**/*.ts"]
}
```

</div>

</div>

style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

``` shiki
import { viteSingleFile } from "vite-plugin-singlefile";

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [viteSingleFile()],
  build: {
    outDir: "dist",
    rollupOptions: {
      input: process.env.INPUT,

});
```

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build.html#building-an-mcp-app"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Building an MCP App</span>

<span data-as="p">Let’s build a simple app that displays the current
server time. This example demonstrates the full pattern: registering a
tool with UI metadata, serving the bundled HTML as a resource, and
building a UI that communicates with the server.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build.html#server-implementation"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Server implementation</span>

<span data-as="p">The server needs to do two things: register a tool
that includes the `_meta.ui.resourceUri` field, and register a resource
handler that serves the bundled HTML. Here’s the complete server
file:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="83" language="typescript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
// server.ts
console.log("Starting MCP App server...");

import { McpServer } from "@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/mcp.js";
import { StreamableHTTPServerTransport } from "@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/streamableHttp.js";
import {
  registerAppTool,
  registerAppResource,
  RESOURCE_MIME_TYPE,
} from "@modelcontextprotocol/ext-apps/server";
import cors from "cors";
import express from "express";
import fs from "node:fs/promises";
import path from "node:path";

const server = new McpServer({
  name: "My MCP App Server",
  version: "1.0.0",
});

// The ui:// scheme tells hosts this is an MCP App resource.
// The path structure is arbitrary; organize it however makes sense for your app.
const resourceUri = "ui://get-time/mcp-app.html";

// Register the tool that returns the current time
registerAppTool(
  server,
  "get-time",
  {
    title: "Get Time",
    description: "Returns the current server time.",
    inputSchema: {},
    _meta: { ui: { resourceUri } },
  },
  async () => {
    const time = new Date().toISOString();
    return {
      content: [{ type: "text", text: time }],
    };
  },
);

// Register the resource that serves the bundled HTML
registerAppResource(
  server,
  resourceUri,
  resourceUri,
  { mimeType: RESOURCE_MIME_TYPE },
  async () => {
    const html = await fs.readFile(
      path.join(import.meta.dirname, "dist", "mcp-app.html"),
      "utf-8",
    );
    return {
      contents: [
        { uri: resourceUri, mimeType: RESOURCE_MIME_TYPE, text: html },
      ],
    };
  },
);

// Expose the MCP server over HTTP
const expressApp = express();
expressApp.use(cors());
expressApp.use(express.json());

expressApp.post("/mcp", async (req, res) => {
  const transport = new StreamableHTTPServerTransport({
    sessionIdGenerator: undefined,
    enableJsonResponse: true,
  });
  res.on("close", () => transport.close());
  await server.connect(transport);
  await transport.handleRequest(req, res, req.body);
});

expressApp.listen(3001, (err) => {
  if (err) {
    console.error("Error starting server:", err);
    process.exit(1);
  }
  console.log("Server listening on http://localhost:3001/mcp");
});
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Let’s break down the key parts:</span>

- **`resourceUri`**: The `ui://` scheme tells hosts this is an MCP App
  resource. The path structure is arbitrary.
- **`registerAppTool`**: Registers a tool with the
  `_meta.ui.resourceUri` field. When the host calls this tool, the UI is
  fetched and rendered, and the tool result is passed to it upon
  arrival.
- **`registerAppResource`**: Serves the bundled HTML when the host
  requests the UI resource.
- **Express server**: Exposes the MCP server over HTTP on port 3001.

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build.html#ui-implementation"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">UI implementation</span>

<span data-as="p">The UI consists of an HTML page and a TypeScript
module that uses the `App` class to communicate with the host. Here’s
the HTML:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="16" language="html">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
<!-- mcp-app.html -->
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <title>Get Time App</title>
  </head>
  <body>
    <p>
      <strong>Server Time:</strong>
      <code id="server-time">Loading...</code>
    </p>
    <button id="get-time-btn">Get Server Time</button>
    <script type="module" src="/src/mcp-app.ts"></script>
  </body>
</html>
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">And the TypeScript module:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="26" language="typescript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
// src/mcp-app.ts
import { App } from "@modelcontextprotocol/ext-apps";

const serverTimeEl = document.getElementById("server-time")!;
const getTimeBtn = document.getElementById("get-time-btn")!;

const app = new App({ name: "Get Time App", version: "1.0.0" });

// Establish communication with the host
app.connect();

// Handle the initial tool result pushed by the host
app.ontoolresult = (result) => {
  const time = result.content?.find((c) => c.type === "text")?.text;
  serverTimeEl.textContent = time ?? "[ERROR]";
};

// Proactively call tools when users interact with the UI
getTimeBtn.addEventListener("click", async () => {
  const result = await app.callServerTool({
    name: "get-time",
    arguments: {},
  });
  const time = result.content?.find((c) => c.type === "text")?.text;
  serverTimeEl.textContent = time ?? "[ERROR]";
});
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">The key parts:</span>

- **`app.connect()`**: Establishes communication with the host. Call
  this once when your app initializes.
- **`app.ontoolresult`**: A callback that fires when the host pushes a
  tool result to your app (e.g., when the tool is first called and the
  UI renders).
- **`app.callServerTool()`**: Lets your app proactively call tools on
  the server. Keep in mind that each call involves a round-trip to the
  server, so design your UI to handle latency gracefully.

<span data-as="p">The `App` class provides additional methods for
logging, opening URLs, and updating the model’s context with structured
data from your app. See the full
<a href="https://apps.extensions.modelcontextprotocol.io/api/"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">API documentation</a>.</span>

##

class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Testing your app</span>

<span data-as="p">To test your MCP App, build the UI and start your
local server:</span>

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"
dir="ltr" orientation="horizontal">

<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 relative pr-2.5 *:first:*:ml-2.5"
component-part="code-group-tab-bar">

<div class="flex-1 w-0 text-xs leading-6 rounded-tl-xl gap-1 flex overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
role="tablist" aria-orientation="horizontal" tabindex="-1"
orientation="horizontal" style="outline:none">

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

macOS/Linux

</div>

<div class="absolute -bottom-1.5 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 rounded-full bg-primary dark:bg-primary-light peer-empty/title:hidden">

</div>

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

Windows

</div>

</div>

src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

<span data-as="p">In the default configuration, your server will be
available at `http://localhost:3001/mcp`. However, to see your app
render, you need an MCP host that supports MCP Apps. You have several
options.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="build.html#testing-with-claude"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Testing with Claude</span>

<span data-as="p"><a href="https://claude.ai" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">Claude</a> (web) and
<a href="https://claude.ai/download" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">Claude Desktop</a> support MCP Apps. For local
development, you’ll need to expose your server to the internet. You can
run an MCP server locally and use tools like `cloudflared` to tunnel
traffic through.</span> <span data-as="p">In a separate terminal,
run:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="1" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
npx cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:3001
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Copy the generated URL (e.g.,
`https://random-name.trycloudflare.com`) and add it as a <a
href="https://support.anthropic.com/en/articles/11175166-getting-started-with-custom-connectors-using-remote-mcp"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">custom connector</a> in
Claude - click on your profile, go to **Settings**, **Connectors**, and
finally **Add custom connector**.</span>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20"
callout-type="note">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">Custom connectors are available on paid Claude plans
(Pro, Max, or Team).</span>

</div>

</div>

<div>

<div class="frame p-2 not-prose relative bg-gray-50/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden dark:bg-gray-800/25 print:print-color-exact"
data-name="frame">

<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-grid-neutral-200/20 [mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,#fff,rgba(255,255,255,0.6))] dark:bg-grid-white/5 dark:[mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.1),rgba(255,255,255,0.5))] print:print-color-exact"
style="background-position:10px 10px">

</div>

<div class="relative rounded-xl overflow-hidden flex justify-center">

<span aria-owns="rmiz-modal-" rmiz=""><span rmiz-content="not-found"
style="visibility:visible"><img
src="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/GU_E-622SLWFdCrP/images/quickstart-apps/add-custom-connector.gif?s=c4ec0750413ff7575c7f9492e2713212"

<span data-as="p">Running `npm start` from
`ext-apps/examples/basic-host/` will start the basic-host test
interface. To connect it to a specific server (e.g., one you’re
developing), pass the `SERVERS` environment variable inline:</span>

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"

<span data-as="p">Navigate to `http://localhost:8080`. You’ll see a
simple interface where you can select a tool and call it. When you call
your tool, the host fetches the UI resource and renders it in a
sandboxed iframe. You can then interact with your app and verify that
tool calls work correctly.</span>

<div>

<div class="frame p-2 not-prose relative bg-gray-50/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden dark:bg-gray-800/25 print:print-color-exact"
data-name="frame">

<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-grid-neutral-200/20 [mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,#fff,rgba(255,255,255,0.6))] dark:bg-grid-white/5 dark:[mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.1),rgba(255,255,255,0.5))] print:print-color-exact"
style="background-position:10px 10px">

</div>

<div class="w-full">
